violations.text: Spray bottle and food residue were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing.PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (retail food storage shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

The floors under retail shelves and walk in freezer have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or icebuild. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside and refuse) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

(Various food product ) was observed held at (46-54 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
Dairy refrigerator observed in poor repair. Observed ambient temperatures at 50DF. PIC made service call during the inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
3 bay sink in the dept dept observed in poor repair. At time of inspection, PIC scheduled a service call for repair. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025
The (floor ) throughout retail area is in poor repair.Observed damage or missing flooring. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen ) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The (ceiling ) in the (retail ) area is in poor repair.Observed missing and water stain tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
